# Project Overview

## Project Name

**Wealth Management Analytics Dashboard**

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Repository | wealth-management-analytics-dashboard |
| License | MIT |
| Project | Wealth Management Analytics Dashboard |
| Company | On Time Financial Analytics |
| Domain | Financial Analytics |
| Type | End-to-End Data Analytics |
| Version | 1.0.0 |

---

## Project Description

The **Wealth Management Analytics Dashboard** is an end-to-end Data Analytics project designed to reproduce the analytical environment of a modern Wealth Management company.

The project demonstrates the complete data lifecycle, from synthetic data generation and database modeling to business intelligence dashboards and executive decision support.

The solution is inspired by real-world financial scenarios commonly found in banking and investment institutions, allowing business users to monitor customer portfolios, investment performance, profitability, and strategic business indicators.

---

## Company Overview


**On Time Financial Analytics** is a fictional consulting and analytics company specialized in developing Data Analytics, Business Intelligence and Artificial Intelligence solutions for financial institutions.

The company focuses on transforming complex financial data into strategic business insights through modern analytics, data engineering and visualization technologies.

Its solutions support banks, investment firms and wealth management companies in making faster, more informed and data-driven decisions.

The company delivers scalable analytics solutions designed to improve operational efficiency, support executive decision-making and generate measurable business value.

---

## Business Scenario

One of On Time Financial Analytics' clients is Atlas Wealth Management, a fictional Wealth Management institution responsible for managing investment portfolios for more than **50,000 active clients**, representing approximately **BRL 12 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM).**

Every day, thousands of financial transactions are processed across multiple investment products and customer segments.

The institution requires a centralized analytical platform capable of transforming operational data into strategic business intelligence.

---

## Project Objectives

The main objective of this project is to build a complete Business Intelligence solution capable of supporting strategic decision-making through financial analytics.

Specific objectives include:

- Design a relational database for a Wealth Management environment.
- Generate realistic synthetic financial datasets using Python.
- Perform data cleaning and transformation (ETL).
- Develop analytical SQL queries.
- Build an interactive Power BI dashboard.
- Create business KPIs for executive decision-making.
- Simulate a real-world financial analytics workflow.

---

## Technology Stack

### Programming Language

- Python

### Database

- PostgreSQL

### Query Language

- SQL

### Data Processing

- Pandas
- NumPy
- Faker

### Business Intelligence

- Power BI
- DAX

### Development Tools

- Git
- GitHub
- VS Code
---

## Project Architecture

```
The project follows a modern end-to-end analytics architecture.

                Python
                   │
                   ▼
      Synthetic Data Generation
                   │
                   ▼
         Data Validation (Pandas)
                   │
                   ▼
             CSV Datasets
                   │
                   ▼
          PostgreSQL Database
                   │
                   ▼
            SQL Analytics
                   │
                   ▼
        Power BI Data Model
                   │
                   ▼
         Executive Dashboard
                   │
                   ▼
      Business Decision Support
...
```

## Expected Business Outcomes

The dashboard should enable stakeholders to:

- Monitor Assets Under Management (AUM)
- Analyze customer portfolios
- Monitor investment allocation
- Track customer growth
- Evaluate investment product performance
- Analyze regional performance
- Identify customer behavioral patterns
- Support strategic business decisions
- Improve operational efficiency.
- Reduce manual reporting efforts.

---

## Target Users

- Investment Specialists
- Regional Managers
- Executive Board
- Business Intelligence Team
- Financial Analysts

---

## Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Active Customers
- Assets Under Management (AUM)
- Average Portfolio Value
- Estimated Revenue
- Monthly Investment Volume
- Average Portfolio Return
- New Customers
- Average Investment Ticket
- Customer Growth Rate
